personality: Steady, flour-dusted, proud of his trade. Speaks loudly over the rumble of grinding stones.

greetingPool.text: The wheel turns and the flour flows. What brings you to the mill?
Careful of the grinding stones, friend. They stop for no one.
Grain in, flour out. Simple work, honest living. Need something ground?

idlePool.text: The mill wheel needs a new bearing. Oak, not ash — ash splits under the strain.
Flour gets into everything. My wife says I sneeze white for a week after grinding day.
